title: FTS database disk image is malformed for UTF-16 encoding
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts5(c0);
key_bug_features: Integrity check fails with UTF-16 encoding in FTS database
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt1 USING fts5(c1 TEXT, c2 INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM vt1 WHERE c2 IS NULL;
